basic_details.job_title: Punjab & Sind Bank Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab & Sind Bank has officially announced the Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 for 1 vacancy on a contractual basis. Candidates holding a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Physiotherapy from a recognized university along with a minimum of 2 years of relevant experience are eligible to apply. Interested applicants can submit their offline applications on or before 15 July 2026. The selected candidate will receive a remuneration of Rs. 7,200 per month. Candidates are advised to review the official notification for complete eligibility criteria, application procedure, and selection details.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor or Master's degree in Physiotherapy
qualification.details: Bachelor or Master's degree in Physiotherapy of any recognized University with minimum 02 years experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://punjabandsind.bank.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Punjab & Sind Bank Physiotherapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download Punjab & Sind Bank Physiotherapist Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Punjab & Sind Bank Physiotherapist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Punjab & Sind Bank Physiotherapist recruitment is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the bank before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor or Master's degree in Physiotherapy from any recognized University. Additionally, a minimum of 02 years of relevant experience is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Physiotherapist position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: scrutiny of applications submitted by the candidates and an interview round.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Physiotherapist post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 7200 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity with Punjab & Sind Bank. The appointment will be on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Punjab & Sind Bank, which is https://punjabandsind.bank.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job posting?
faq.answer: The job posting is located in Shimla, Himachal Pradesh, with the pincode 171001.
